posts.author: Diana
posts.title: Out-of-control court blocks new vaccine recommendations under  Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. HHS said it “looks forward to the judge’s decision being overturned.

link_metadata.description: A federal court in Boston today blocked a key government vaccine advisory committee from holding its scheduled meeting this week, and paused changes the committee made to vaccine recommendations under U.S. Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. HHS said it “looks forward to the judge’s decision being overturned.”
link_metadata.title: Breaking: Federal Court Blocks ACIP Meeting, Changes to Childhood Vaccine Schedule
